formulas.formula: Sum of current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus noncurrent assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Sum of current liabilities equals Total current liabilities

formulas.formula: Sum of equity components equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: CFO components sum to Net cash provided by operating activities
components: Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + Deferred income taxes - Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: CFI components sum to Net cash used in investing activities
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: CFF components sum to Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to employee stock plan taxes
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets - Repayment of debt
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

Net cash used in financing activities

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS current period
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS prior period
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus Dividends minus Share repurchases charged to retained earnings plus other retained earnings items
cross_statement_checks.note: Change in retained earnings = 107908 - 68038 = 39870. Net income 77107 minus dividends 732 minus repurchases charged to retained earnings 36505 = 39870. The repurchases of 36733 total were split between APIC (228) and retained earnings (36505) per the equity statement.

operating_leases.current_location: Current operating lease liability of 341 million is disclosed in Note 14 leases maturity table as 'Less short-term operating lease liabilities' and is classified within Accrued and other current liabilities on the balance sheet face per the XBRL tag us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent with context c-6

components.label: Depreciation and amortization (single line on CF statement)

depreciation_and_amortization.note: The CF statement shows a single line. Note 13 discloses segment D&A: Compute and Networking 1.1 billion and Graphics 426 million for the nine months of FY26 (approximately 1526 million), plus acquisition-related intangible amortization of 338 million for nine months, totaling approximately 1864 million from segments. The 2031 million total on the CF includes all D&A. Amortization of intangibles per Note 7 was 338 million for nine months FY26.

accounts_payable.note: Accounts payable is presented as a separate line item on the balance sheet labeled 'Accounts payable' tagged as us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent = 8624 million as of 2025-10-26. No note indicates it is combined with accrued liabilities.

accounts_receivable.note: Accounts receivable net is presented as a separate line item on the balance sheet labeled 'Accounts receivable, net' tagged as us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent = 33391 million as of 2025-10-26. No indication of combination with other receivables on the face.

capex.note: CF line labeled 'Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets' tagged us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets = 4758 million for nine months FY26. Note 8 discloses 'Property, equipment and intangible assets acquired but not paid for the first nine months of fiscal year 2026 were 790 million' tagged us-gaap:CapitalExpendituresIncurredButNotYetPaid = 790 million.

components.label: Short-term portion of long-term notes (3.20% Notes Due 2026)

short_term_debt.note: Short-term debt of 999 million as of 2025-10-26 represents the current portion of the 3.20% Notes Due 2026 as disclosed in Note 10 Debt. Balance sheet line 'Short-term debt' tagged us-gaap:DebtCurrent = 999 million. No commercial paper outstanding as of that date.

sbc.note: CF uses us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation = 4753 million. Note 2 discloses SBC by function for nine months FY26: Cost of revenue 192, R&D 3460, SGA 1101, Total 4753 million (net of amounts capitalized into inventory). The XBRL tag us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense = 4753 million for FY26 nine months matches.

interest_expense.source: The IS shows Interest income (us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest = 1732) and Interest expense (us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating = 186) as separate line items for the nine months ended October 26 2025. The interest expense of 186 million is the gross figure comprised of coupon interest and debt discount amortization per MD&A. No evidence of netting; they are presented separately.

tax_rate.note: Nine months FY26: IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit = 13945, IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest = 91052, effective rate = 15.3% per XBRL EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations = 0.153. Pretax income is positive; tax expense is positive. No flags needed.

inventory.note: Inventory breakdown from Note 8 Balance Sheet Components: Raw materials 4209, Work in process 8735, Finished goods 6840, Total 19784 million as of October 26 2025. All values from XBRL InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves, InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves, InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves, InventoryNet.

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other income net equals Total other income net
Operating income plus Total other income net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
Sum of current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus noncurrent assets equals Total assets
Sum of current liabilities equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus noncurrent liabilities equals Total liabilities
Sum of equity components equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
CFO components sum to Net cash provided by operating activities
CFI components sum to Net cash used in investing activities
CFF components sum to Net cash used in financing activities
CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash
Beginning cash plus Change equals Ending cash
